news.title:
JM Financial downgrades Swiggy to 'Reduce', cuts target price by 27% to Rs 270 citing weak Instamart strategy.
Swiggy faces market share losses, rising competition, and negative EBITDA till FY29; Instamart deemed value-destructive.
news.summary:
JM Financial downgrades Swiggy to 'Reduce', cuts target price by 27% to Rs 270 citing weak Instamart strategy.
Swiggy faces market share losses, rising competition, and negative EBITDA till FY29; Instamart deemed value-destructive.

news.title:
Swiggy shuts its 15-min food delivery app SNACC after struggles with profitability; employees to be reassigned.
SNACC, launched in Bengaluru & Gurugram in 2025, faced scaling issues despite emerging market fit.

news.title:
